name: Kewal Kiran Clothing Limited
summary: Kewal Kiran Clothing Limited engages in manufacturing, marketing, and retailing branded readymade garments and finished accessories for men and women in Asia, in the Middle East, and the Commonwealth of Independent States. It offers casual, formal, semi-formal, and western wear for men, as well as fusion wear for women; jeans, trousers, shirts, T-shirts, jackets, pullovers, and fashion accessories; and branded accessories, such as deodorants, watches, wallets, belts, and inner wear. The company distributes its products primarily under the Killer, Easies, LawmanPg3, Integriti, and Desi Belle brand names through company owned and company operated, franchisee owned and franchisee operated, factory outlets, multi-brand outlets, and national chain stores, as well as e-commerce channels. It operates 205 K-Lounge, 116 exclusive brand outlets (EBOs), and 1 factory outlet. Kewal Kiran Clothing Limited was founded in 1980 and is headquartered in Mumbai, India.
